original-actions: Listens to thieves in a tavern describe the fabled Heart of the Elephant jewel
Questions a Kothian rogue about the Elephant Tower and its defenses
Kills the Kothian in a tavern brawl after being mocked and attacked
Escapes the darkened tavern into the moonlit streets of Arenjun
Approaches the Tower of the Elephant after nightfall to steal the jewel
Scales the outer wall surrounding Yara's garden compound
Discovers a strangled guard and deduces another thief is present
Confronts Taurus of Nemedia and agrees to partner on the heist
Watches Taurus neutralize the garden lions with black lotus powder
Kills a surviving lion that attacks him with a decisive sword strike
Follows Taurus to the tower base and prepares to climb
Ascends the sheer tower wall using Taurus's grappling hook and rope
Reaches the jeweled parapet at the tower's summit
Discovers Taurus dead from a giant spider's venomous bite
Battles the enormous spider guardian in the treasure chamber
Crushes the spider to death by hurling a heavy chest of gems at it
Descends deeper into the tower searching for the Heart of the Elephant
Discovers Yag-kosha, a blinded and tortured alien prisoner
Listens to Yag-kosha recount his cosmic origins and betrayal by Yara
Agrees to fulfill the dying creature's request for vengeance
Takes the Heart of the Elephant jewel from its resting place
Kills Yag-kosha with a merciful blade stroke at the creature's request
Extracts Yag-kosha's heart from the corpse
Drips the heart's blood onto the Heart of the Elephant jewel
Carries the blood-infused gem to the sleeping sorcerer Yara
Places the enchanted jewel before Yara, triggering its magic
Watches as Yara shrinks and is drawn screaming into the gem
Flees the tower immediately as instructed by Yag-kosha
Emerges from the collapsing tower at dawn with only his sword and clothes
generalized-actions: Gathers intelligence on legendary treasure from underworld contacts
Questions local rogue about target location and its defenses
Kills antagonist in tavern brawl after provocation and attack
Escapes violence into city streets under cover of darkness
Approaches fortified target after nightfall to steal treasure
Scales outer wall surrounding sorcerer's compound
Discovers slain guard and deduces rival thief is present
Confronts fellow thief and agrees to partner on heist
Observes partner neutralize guard beasts with alchemical powder
Kills surviving beast with decisive sword strike when attacked
Follows partner to tower base and prepares vertical ascent
Ascends sheer tower wall using partner's climbing equipment
Reaches ornate parapet at the tower's summit
Discovers partner dead from guardian creature's venom
Battles monstrous guardian in treasure chamber alone
Kills guardian by improvising heavy object as crushing weapon
Descends deeper into tower searching for legendary treasure
Discovers imprisoned otherworldly being tortured by sorcerer
Listens to prisoner recount origins and betrayal by captor
Agrees to fulfill dying prisoner's request for vengeance
Takes legendary jewel from its resting place
Grants merciful death to suffering creature at its request
Extracts heart from prisoner's corpse for ritual purpose
Performs blood ritual on enchanted jewel as instructed
Carries enchanted gem to sleeping sorcerer as weapon
Places cursed jewel before sorcerer, triggering vengeful magic
Witnesses sorcerer's destruction as magic consumes him
Flees collapsing structure immediately as instructed
Emerges from destruction at dawn with only sword and clothes
